name: domain-policy
description: Domain binding and configuration policy governing domain registration, binding, and lifecycle management

policy.principle: Each deployment binds a unique domain. Domain configuration is stored centrally. Registrar operations are external.

registration.description: Domain registration is manual via Namecheap. Not automated in the pipeline.

binding.description: Domains are bound to Vercel projects. Both apex and www are bound.

dns.description: DNS is managed through Cloudflare with A record for apex and CNAME for www

verification.description: Both apex and www must resolve via DNS and respond over HTTPS

configuration.description: Domain configuration stored in central config file

cleanup.description: Domain binding and DNS records persist through rollback
